steps.title: Read the trend
steps.content: The points trend downward from left to right, so the linear model should have a negative slope. The trend is above the origin near the $y$-axis, so the $y$-intercept should be positive.

steps.title: Calculator shortcut
steps.content: Graph the four answer-choice lines over the scatterplot. The matching model is the one with a negative slope and a positive $y$-intercept. The answer is B.
